_readme: 타임스탬프 whisper 단어 실측 (파이프라인 v6 기본)
title: lie down on the job

sentences.en: ★ Shouldn't they be there by now? What's taking them so long?
sentences.ko: ★ 지금쯤 도착했어야 하는 거 아냐? 왜 이렇게 오래 걸려?

sentences.en: Hey, these guys are professionals. They're the best.
★ Come on! They're not lying down on the job.
sentences.ko: ★ 에이, 설마 일하다 드러누워 농땡이 부리겠어.
